title: Unofficial Skytopia modpack
description:
Unofficial Skyland modpack. 

*Not server restricted, should work on all servers
body:
Unofficial modpack for Skytopia


Enjoy The Best Of Fabric Mods



Features


  • ⛰️ Visual Overhauls : Discover Over a Dozen Visual Mods and Must-Have Resource Packs!
  • 🤌 Quality of Life Changes : Such as the Advanced Chat Mod, that Allow you to Fully Customize your Chat, add Chat Tabs, and More...
  • 🚀 Unleash the Full Potential of Your Game : Performance Mods That Will Allow You to Unleash Your Minecraft Game's Potential!
  • 🔊 Sound changes : Added Sounds, Sound Engine Reworked.


Recommended Ressources Packs


Sky Ressource Packs :

- [Grimdark Sky Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/grimdark-sky) - [Clouds & Planets](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clouds-planets) - [Hyper Realistic Sky](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hyper-realistic-sky) - [Dramatic Skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys)

Gui Ressource Pack :

- [Reimagined GUI (Dark)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimaginedguidark) - [Mandala's GUI - Dark mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode)

Main Ressource Pack :

- [Spectral](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spectral)


Configuration

A Few Mods need to be Configured, look up comments in the **modlist Below**.

If you want to import premade chat tabs for Advanced chat tabs, go into AC parameters, HUD, Chat tabs, import and paste the tabs from below.

Advanced Chat Tabs :
Island {"name":"Island","order":0,"startingMessage":"","forward":false,"abbreviation":"Island","mainColor":"#643F3F3F","borderColor":"#B4000000","innerColor":"#64000000","showUnread":true,"match":[{"pattern":"[Island]","findtype":"literal"}],"uuid":"cd344840-0fdb-4c5f-afa2-55150b43a694"}
Global {"name":"Global","order":0,"startingMessage":"","forward":false,"abbreviation":"Global","mainColor":"#643F3F3F","borderColor":"#B4000000","innerColor":"#64000000","showUnread":true,"match":[{"pattern":"","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":" ","findtype":"literal"}],"uuid":"b3fdf01a-213e-4e7e-8d11-b9b3ffefcceb"}
Announcements {"name":"Announcements","order":0,"startingMessage":"","forward":false,"abbreviation":"Skytopia","mainColor":"#643F3F3F","borderColor":"#B4000000","innerColor":"#64000000","showUnread":false,"match":[{"pattern":"Battlepass","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"just wished a ","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"just threw a","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"collected his","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"Skytopia","findtype":"literal"}],"uuid":"67a55e70-e34a-4ffb-aa44-826e36993e80"}
System {"name":"System","order":0,"startingMessage":"","forward":false,"abbreviation":"Sys","mainColor":"#643F3F3F","borderColor":"#B4000000","innerColor":"#64000000","showUnread":false,"match":[{"pattern":"(!)","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"[!]","findtype":"literal"},{"pattern":"[Broadcast]","findtype":"literal"}],"uuid":"e5c7ffc5-0326-4e02-af35-807de46c37fd"}

Plus

If you have an Nvidia RTX and does not use Shaders, install [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)

Support

As of now, there is no Support from my part. Don't forget the fact that this is an unofficial modpack, so don't spam the server team for support. I recommend having a little knowledge in modding Minecraft before modifying the modlist.

Issues

- **AdvancedChat** crashes when exiting the chat tab customization with **ESCAPE** instead of clicking the "Back" button.
